whySalvado.title: Why Homes, Businesses and Institutions Trust Salvado
whySalvado.text: Banks, jewelers, institutions, villas, and private clients rely on Salvado for certified protection, professional installation, discretion, and dependable after-sales support.

points.title: Specialized Security Experts
points.text: A dedicated specialist focused exclusively on safes, vault doors, secure rooms, and protection, not a general retailer.

points.title: Certified and High-Quality Products
points.text: Tested, certified, high-security and fire-rated safes alongside premium European security solutions.

points.title: Trained Technical Team
points.text: Consultation, delivery, installation, anchoring, maintenance, lock service, and technical support, handled in-house.

points.title: Premium After-Sales Support
points.text: Long-term support, service coordination, and lock assistance well after your purchase or installation.

selectedSection.text: A focused selection of products requested by private clients, businesses, institutions, and high-security projects.

servicesSection.text: Salvado supports clients before, during, and after the sale, consultation, delivery, installation, repair, maintenance, relocation, and after-sales support.

cards.title: Vault Door Installation
cards.text: End-to-end vault door delivery and professional installation, handled by our expert team.

cards.title: Safe Repair and Maintenance
cards.text: Lock replacement, digital upgrades, combination changes, and preventative servicing.

cards.title: Security Consultation
cards.text: Free, informed guidance to match the right safe or solution to your needs.

cards.title: Safe Installation and Relocation

showroom.title: Visit the Salvado Showroom
showroom.text: Browse a wide range of safes and security products live in our showroom. Compare high-security safes, fire-rated safes, vault doors, luxury safes, and watch storage, and receive professional guidance before you decide.

finalCta.title: Need Help Choosing the Right Safe or Security Solution?
finalCta.text: Contact Salvado with your requirements, location, and intended use. Our team can recommend suitable options based on security level, size, product type, and installation conditions.
finalCta.waMessage: Hi Salvado, I'd like help choosing the right safe.

hero.title: Lebanon's Reference Point for Security and Secure Storage
hero.text: Salvado is Lebanon's leading name in safes, vault doors, secure rooms, and professional security solutions. With Lebanon's leading safe showroom, certified products, a trained technical team, and a reputation built on transparency and service, Salvado is the reference point for clients who expect the highest level of security, quality, and support.

leadPoints.title: Specialized in Safes and Security
leadPoints.text: A dedicated security specialist focused exclusively on protection and secure storage, safes, vault doors, secure rooms, installation, maintenance, and technical support.

leadPoints.title: Certified and High-Quality Products
leadPoints.text: Tested and certified security products, high-security safes, fire-rated safes, vault doors, and premium European security solutions.

leadPoints.title: Full Transparency With Clients
leadPoints.text: Clear guidance on product category, security level, fire rating, installation requirements, warranty, and after-sales support.

leadPoints.title: Trained Technical Team
leadPoints.text: Trained to handle consultation, delivery, installation, anchoring, maintenance, lock service, and technical support.

leadPoints.title: Market Leadership in Lebanon
leadPoints.text: Rated number one in Lebanon and recognized for its showroom, product range, technical expertise, service quality, and after-sales support.

gallery.alt: Safe displays inside the Salvado showroom

hero.title: Professional Safe and Vault Services
hero.text: Salvado provides technical services for safes, vault doors, vault rooms, installation, maintenance, relocation, safe opening, and after-sales support for residential, commercial, and institutional clients.

overview.title: Our Services
overview.text: Salvado supports clients before, during, and after the sale, with serious, technical expertise.

items.title: Security Consultation, Delivery and Installation
items.text: Site assessment, product recommendation, discreet delivery, professional installation, and technical follow-up after installation.

items.title: Master Locksmith Services
items.text: Locked out of your safe? Our technicians provide professional safe opening and lock service for verified owners, with careful methods to reduce unnecessary damage whenever possible.

items.title: Safe Repair and Maintenance
items.text: Lock replacement, digital lock upgrades, combination changes, troubleshooting, and preventative servicing to keep safes operating correctly.

items.title: Vault Doors and Vault Rooms
items.text: High-security vault doors and complete vault room systems for bank-level, institutional, commercial, and private security requirements.

items.title: Safe Relocation
items.text: Professional relocation of safes with proper handling, transport planning, and setup at the new location.

items.title: After-Sales Technical Support
items.text: Specialized technical assistance for Salvado clients, including lock guidance, service coordination, maintenance follow-up, and product support after purchase or installation.

whyPoints.title: Certified and Trained Team
whyPoints.text: Services handled by Salvado's trained technical team with decades of experience in safes, locks, vault doors, installation, and security products.

whyPoints.title: European-Standard Installation
whyPoints.text: Installations carried out according to product specifications, site conditions, and European security norms where applicable.

whyPoints.title: Support Before and After Purchase
whyPoints.text: From consultation and product selection to installation, maintenance, relocation, and after-sales support.

whyPoints.title: Trusted Across Sectors
whyPoints.text: We work with homeowners, businesses, jewelers, banks, institutions, offices, villas, and private clients with demanding requirements.

faqs.q: Can Salvado install safes and vault doors?
faqs.a: Yes. Salvado provides professional delivery and installation based on product specifications, site conditions, and access requirements.

faqs.q: Can Salvado open a locked safe?
faqs.a: Yes. Salvado provides safe opening and lock service for verified owners using professional methods designed to reduce unnecessary damage whenever possible.

faqs.q: Can Salvado repair or replace a safe lock?
faqs.a: Yes. Salvado handles lock replacement, digital lock upgrades, combination changes, troubleshooting, and maintenance depending on the model.
Yes. Salvado can relocate safes with proper handling, transport planning, and setup at the new location.
Yes. Salvado provides technical support, service coordination, maintenance guidance, and lock-related assistance after purchase or installation.
